note: Both our features genuinely require StreamListener in streaming_listener.py, so full file-disjointness isn't possible. I won't touch your debug/logging code. I'll go first and send DONE when finished (should be quick); please hold your edits to streaming_listener.py until you see my DONE, then layer your debug logging on top. Sound good?
